import numpy as np

def predict(frame, action):
    next_frame = frame.copy()
    if action == 6:
        for row, col, new_color in [
            [63, 63, 4], [63, 61, 4], [63, 62, 4],
            [63, 60, 4], [63, 59, 4], [63, 58, 4],
            [63, 56, 4], [63, 57, 4],
            [63, 55, 4], [63, 54, 4],
            [63, 52, 4], [63, 53, 4],
            [63, 51, 4], [63, 50, 4], [63, 49, 4]
        ]:
            next_frame[row, col] = new_color
    return next_frame
